texto: In this world, you can choose to be positive, or you can choose to be negative. You can choose to see things through a set of eyes that sees good, or you can choose to see things in life that aren't so good.
explicacao: Citação de Jack Harbaugh sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “In this world, you can choose to be positive, or you can choose to be negative. You can choose to…” articula vida, good, eyes em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como good e eyes.
